title: Autotuner: stats
description: Periodic Ruby process memory and object metrics from Autotuner. Field names depend on the Autotuner version and enabled checks.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Set by the Honeybadger agent when available.

hostname.description: Server hostname. Attached to every event by default (events.attach_hostname).

environment.description: Application environment, e.g. "production". Attached to every event by default (events.attach_environment).

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic metric value (e.g. heap_allocated, heap_retained, live_objects, gc_count).
